description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a predominantly flat roof and a mix of white, black, and green exterior elements. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, with some sections featuring stepped or terraced green areas, likely representing rooftop gardens or patios. Large, flat surfaces dominate the facade, with minimal visible ornamentation, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some long horizontal strips and others more isolated, contributing to the modernist style. The entryway appears understated, integrated into the main volume without prominent steps or porches, and the overall massing suggests a single-story layout. The use of green accents and open roof spaces hints at an eco-friendly or sustainable design approach.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white, black, and green exterior, featuring rooftop gardens and asymmetrical window placement. The design is clean, rectilinear, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with stepped green rooftop areas and a mix of white and black surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat expanse of the building and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying terraced green roof sections and a more solid, block-like appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible green rooftop elements and a less articulated facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway integrated into the facade, no prominent steps or porch, flush with main volume
